overall.description: Aerial drone footage navigating through a dense futuristic cyberpunk cityscape, characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077. The camera glides smoothly between towering skyscrapers adorned with neon signage, passing flying vehicles and revealing industrial cooling towers and massive megastructures under clear blue skies.

events.description: yellow flying vehicle passes from left to right through the corridor
dark flying vehicle passes from right to left through the corridor

agents.ego_description: flying forward through the narrow gap between towering skyscrapers at steady speed

notable_agents.action: yellow flying car passes quickly from left to right across the field of view
dark flying car passes from right to left through the narrow corridor

entered.detail: dark glass and metal facade of the left building with horizontal louvers and neon accents
dark glass and metal facade of the right building with horizontal louvers
twin industrial cooling towers emitting steam in the distant city center
white steam rising from the industrial district in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a narrow aerial corridor between two massive dark skyscrapers. The camera flies forward through this tight space as two flying vehicles pass through the corridor—first a yellow car from left to right, then a dark car from right to left. In the distance, industrial cooling towers emit steam against the clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from narrow corridor to open city aerial view

events.description: exits the narrow building corridor into a more open aerial view of the city

agents.ego_description: flying forward while drifting right, opening up the view to reveal more of the sprawling cityscape

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement with colorful graphics on the left building facade
massive industrial building complex with geometric brutalist architecture ahead

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow corridor, the scene opens into a wider aerial view of the cyberpunk city. The right skyscraper falls behind as the camera drifts right, revealing neon billboards on the left building and a massive industrial complex ahead. The cooling towers remain visible in the distance as the spatial layout transitions from enclosed to semi-open.

scene_state.functional_zone: open aerial view of dense cyberpunk downtown

events.description: flying vehicle passes from right to left across the view

agents.ego_description: flying steadily through the open city airspace while turning right to observe the sprawling urban landscape

notable_agents.action: flying car travels from right to left through the mid-ground airspace

entered.detail: vertical neon signage and advertisements on the right side buildings
mechanical equipment, hvac units, and antenna arrays on building rooftops

segments.scene_description: The camera flies through open airspace with full sky visibility, turning right to reveal more of the city's dense architecture. A flying car passes from right to left at 24 seconds. The industrial complex ahead grows larger, moving from far to mid-distance, while the cooling towers shift to the left side of the frame. Neon billboards and rooftop mechanical structures become prominent on the right.

agents.ego_description: flying forward approaching the large industrial complex, revealing detailed rooftop structures and antenna arrays

entered.detail: tall communication towers and complex antennae array on the building roof
active industrial steam vent emitting white smoke from a nearby building rooftop
colorful illuminated billboards and corporate signage on the left buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the massive industrial megastructure, with the building filling the center of the frame from mid to near distance. Detailed rooftop equipment, antenna arrays, and steam vents become clearly visible. The cooling towers and right-side billboards fade into the distance as the camera focuses on the intricate architecture of the approaching complex.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial glide that transitions from a claustrophobic urban corridor into a vast, open industrial expanse. It begins by flying through a narrow gap between two massive dark skyscrapers as yellow and dark flying vehicles cross the path, with steam-emitting cooling towers visible in the far distance. As the camera exits this tight space and drifts right, the scene opens into a wider cityscape where neon billboards emerge on the left and the spatial layout shifts from enclosed to semi-open. The camera then maneuvers through open airspace, turning right to reveal dense architecture and rooftop mechanical structures while a flying car passes by and the industrial complex grows in scale. Finally, the view converges on the massive industrial megastructure, with the camera approaching detailed antenna arrays and steam vents as the surrounding city and cooling towers fade into the background.
